name: Italian Sausage Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Italian sausage into 2-inch lengths and brown it off in olive oil (about half cook it). Remove from the pan and set aside.
2. In the same pan, add flour to the remaining oil to make a roux. Cook until the roux is golden.
3. Add onions, celery, and bell pepper to the roux. Stir and cook until tender or clear.
4. Gradually add water, stirring until smooth.
5. Pour in white wine (experiment with amount as needed), parsley, garlic, red cayenne pepper, Lea & Perrins, and tomato sauce. Stir well.
6. Bring to a boil and add salt to taste.
7. Return the sausage to the sauce and bring back to a boil.
8. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for about 3 to 4 hours.
9. Serve over spaghetti topped with cheese.
